meeting.track_notes: Poly. 2000m track inside the turf circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. Turf. 2800m triangular-shaped circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. DRAW: Poly: Low-number draws slightly preferred 1400m and 1600m. Turf: Low-number draws preferable, especially 1400m and 1600m.
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Poly: Low-number draws slightly preferred 1400m and 1600m. Turf: Low-number draws preferable, especially 1400m and 1600m.

races.race_name: BET WITH COLOSSUS POOLS EXCLUSIVE ON www.tote.co.za MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Rested OMKHULU BOSS takes to the poly for the first time but has been improving all the while. He was second in a decent race last time. MOLTEN ROCK is a filly taking on males. She has been consistently placed in her last three starts on the Highveld and could prefer the surface. NAUTICAL FIRE made a smart debut at lengthy odds. He is drawn in gate No 1, has a 1.5kg claimer up and any improvement can see him finish close. FREE ROAMING found some market support first up on the poly but was a well beaten fourth. The stable has come to hand.

races.race_name: JOIN THE RACE COAST TURF CLUB TODAY! APPRENTICE MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Trippi colt THE SWAN SONG made a promising debut. It was a progressive effort over 1000m and he should make good improvement over the extra. DONMAGOO has been knock- ing on the door of late and although he has the widest draw should feature in this line-up. OWNER OF CREATION has run some good races but is taking his time. He best recent form has been on the Polytrack. With a 4kg claimer up he can finally break his duck. QUEEN OF DENMARK was not too far back on debut starting at long odds and can run into the money.

races.race_name: LIVE IT. LOVE IT. OWN IT. www.racecoast. co.za MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Filly AYZAL steps up to 1600m at just her third start and makes her poly debut. The trip should suit and she only has 49kg to shoulder. GOLDEN DIOGO came in for betting support nd showed up nicely. He has room for further improvement. GREEN COMMANDER has been a beaten favourite at his last two on the poly. He was just behind GOLDEN DIOGO when last they met and could be dangerous from gate No 1. FORT USHER steps up in trip after making a fair debut behind promising Benny And Paul. He is one to watch in the betting.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: POWERANDTHEGLORY was narrowly beaten over course and distance last time out. He has a bit of class and should be a big runner in this. CARDINAL CHIEF had a plum gate when not far behind POWERANDTHEGLORY last time and is weighted to give him a hard time. However, he has a wide draw to overcome this time. FUTURE FLO and KING OF SPIN are very capable and must be respected. GOLDEN RULE has the widest draw to contend with but he can get away if allowed to. CITY OF LOVE has good turf form and is a lot better than his earlier try on the Poly.

races.race_name: RACE COAST - BRIGHT FUTURE FOR SA HORSE RACING APPRENTICE CLASS 4 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MYSTIC DANCER was touched off in a tight finish last time out. She goes well on the poly and the extra distance should not trouble her. MISS LADYATERIX takes a big drop in class and although she has a fair weight to shoulder she does have the best draw. LAST CAR TO PASS could be the one to follow after a fair Poly debut after a rest. LAST MARGARITA has won her last two on the poly and only has 49.5kg to shoulder. A third win is on the cards although she takes on much stronger. LA LANDONNE was a beaten favourite over course and distance last time. She must have a say.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: HOODIA has been dropping in the ratings and it has been some time since his maiden win. However, he made marked improvement when trying the Poly and fitted with a tongue-tie and is 1kg better off with BLUE STEEL who was a game winner last time. Candice Bass’ gelding is talented but not the easiest ride. Athandiwe Mgudlwa got the best out of him and he can follow up. BANGLADESH caught the eye last time and tries the trip. THE GLIDING FISH has been close-up in his last two on the poly. He does take on stronger but only has 51.5kg to shoulder and a top rider. STATUS is lightly raced but does appear to be useful.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: BLAZING FURY has the best of the draws and has shown up well over course and distance. He has a handy galloping weight and should have every chance. POSITION OF POWER is lightly raced but seldom out of the money. His last win on the poly was impressive and he cannot be left out of anything. CONNERY gets the benefit of a useful 4kg claimer aboard but is sel- dom far back and can prevail from his wide gate. INSIDE VOICE takes on males but was not far back first up on the poly and has only once finished out of the money in six starts.

races.race_name: JOIN THE FUN www.socialsquad.co.za C STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Wide open. SAUDI SWEEP found her best form when winning comfortably last time out and a repeat performance should see her in the mix again. YOUR LADYSHIP has been drop- ping in the ratings but has been consistent of late. The trip suits and she should go close. INNERBLOOM is lightly raced but won well first run on the poly and although she has a big weight she is from an in-form stable and can follow up. WINTER BLESSING was 2.30 lengths behind SAUDI SWEEP and is 1.5kg better off. There should be little between them.
